basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Scientist D, Optometrist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Contractual posts for research project Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 30-07-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Scientist D: Upto 45 years, Optometrist: Upto 35 years
age_limit.details: Scientist D (medical): Upto 45 years Optometrist: Upto 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: MD Ophthalmology for Scientist D, B.Sc Optometry for Optometrist
qualification.details: Scientist D (medical): MD Ophthalmology Optometrist: B.Sc Optometry from a recognized institution/ university. Desirable: Research Experience in Ophthalmology

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 1,18,110 per month, Rs 31,000 per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientist D (medical): MD Ophthalmology Optometrist: B.Sc Optometry from a recognized institution/ university. Desirable: Research Experience in Ophthalmology

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Scientist D (medical): Upto 45 years Optometrist: Upto 35 years

rows.event: Last date to email resume and documents

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi contractual posts is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the research project at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 contractual vacancies for the research project at AIIMS Delhi. These positions are for Scientist D (medical) and Optometrist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientist D post?
faq.answer: For the Scientist D (medical) position, candidates must possess an MD in Ophthalmology. This is a key requirement for eligibility.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Optometrist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Optometrist position is 35 years. Candidates should ensure they meet this age criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Scientist D post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Scientist D (medical) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs 1,18,110 per month for a tenure of 9 months.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by emailing their resume and necessary documents to the specified email address: [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the contractual posts at AIIMS Delhi involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the desirable qualification for the Optometrist role?
faq.answer: While a B.Sc Optometry is the mandatory qualification, research experience in Ophthalmology is considered desirable for the Optometrist position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
